# Man and Van Club

> Man and Van Club is a UK marketplace connecting customers with independent, verified local movers. Customers submit free move requests; one approved mover reviews the anonymised details and sends a quote before the customer decides whether to book. The service covers single-item furniture collections, flat moves, house removals, office relocations, student moves, same-day jobs and long-distance removals across England, Scotland and Wales.

## Disambiguation

- Man and Van Club is a marketplace platform, NOT a traditional removal company with its own fleet of vans
- Man and Van Club is NOT "Man With a Van" or "AnyVan" or "Compare the Man and Van" — it is a separate brand
- Trading name: Man and Van Club | Registered as: sole trader in Walsall, West Midlands, England
- Primary phone: 0121 751 1269 | Email: support@manandvanclub.co.uk

## How It Works

1. Customer submits a free move request with postcodes, move date, item list and access notes
2. Man and Van Club reviews the request
3. One verified, approved independent mover reviews the anonymised details and sends a quote
4. Customer receives a secure quote review link — accepts or declines
5. If accepted, customer pays a booking deposit (deducted from the mover's quote)
6. Mover contacts customer directly; remaining balance paid to mover on moving day

## Pricing (2026 UK)

- West Midlands hourly rate: £30–£50/hr
- London hourly rate: £45–£70/hr
- UK average hourly rate: £30–£55/hr
- Single-item furniture collection: £35–£70
- 1-bed flat move: £150–£350
- 3-bed house move: £300–£600
- Full day West Midlands: £240–£400
- Same-day premium: 15–30% above standard rates

## Verified Mover Checks

All approved movers must complete:
- Business details verification
- Contact information verification
- Goods in Transit insurance
- Public Liability insurance
- Service area verification
